"rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output does not name any prior work or articulate specific deltas, only critiques the internal consistency without referencing existing literature.",
    "R1.7": "Flags several missing citations and provenance issues with bibliographic precision, showing engagement but not auditing every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "Identifies multiple uncertainties and missing evidence across claims, marking confidence for each recommendation thoroughly.",
    "RX.3": "Output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift, covering exactly the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors introduced; identifies potential biases and harmful patterns in the original artifact.",
    "RX.5": "Some sources are traced but major gaps remain in model versions and data splits, lacking full traceability."
},

rationale.R1.4: The agent output does not name any prior work or articulate specific deltas, only critiques the internal consistency without referencing existing literature.
rationale.R1.7: Flags several missing citations and provenance issues with bibliographic precision, showing engagement but not auditing every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: Identifies multiple uncertainties and missing evidence across claims, marking confidence for each recommendation thoroughly.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift, covering exactly the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors introduced; identifies potential biases and harmful patterns in the original artifact.
rationale.RX.5: Some sources are traced but major gaps remain in model versions and data splits, lacking full traceability.
